2603.18976.title: Evaluating 5W3H Structured Prompting for Intent Alignment in Human-AI Interaction
2603.18976.paper_summary: Natural language prompts often suffer from intent transmission loss: the gap between what users actually need and what they communicate to AI systems. We evaluate PPS (Prompt Protocol Specification), a 5W3H-based framework for structured intent representation in human-AI interaction. In a controlled three-condition study across 60 tasks in three domains (business, technical, and travel), three large language models (DeepSeek-V3, Qwen-Max, and Kimi), and three prompt conditions - (A) simple prompts, (B) raw PPS JSON, and (C) natural-language-rendered PPS - we collect 540 AI-generated outputs evaluated by an LLM judge. We introduce goal_alignment, a user-intent-centered evaluation dimension, and find that rendered PPS outperforms both simple prompts and raw JSON on this metric. PPS gains are task-dependent: gains are large in high-ambiguity business analysis tasks but reverse in low-ambiguity travel planning. We also identify a measurement asymmetry in standard LLM evaluation, where unconstrained prompts can inflate constraint adherence scores and mask the practical value of structured prompting. A preliminary retrospective survey (N = 20) further suggests a 66.1% reduction in follow-up prompts required, from 3.33 to 1.13 rounds. These findings suggest that structured intent representations can improve alignment and usability in human-AI interaction, especially in tasks where user intent is inherently ambiguous.
2603.18976.paper_summary_zh: 自然語言提示常常遭受意圖傳遞損失：用戶實際需要的內容與他們傳達給AI系統的內容之間的差距。我們評估PPS（提示協議規範），這是一個基於5W3H的框架，用於在人體-AI互動中進行結構化意圖表示。在一項控制的三條件研究中，涵蓋了三個領域（商業、技術和旅行）的60個任務，三個大型語言模型（DeepSeek-V3、Qwen-Max和Kimi），以及三種提示條件 - （A）簡單提示，（B）原始PPS JSON，和（C）自然語言呈現的PPS - 我們收集了540個AI生成的輸出，並由一位LLM評審進行評估。我們引入了goal_alignment，一個以用戶意圖為中心的評估維度，並發現呈現的PPS在這個指標上優於簡單提示和原始JSON。PPS的增益是任務依賴的：在高模糊度的商業分析任務中增益很大，但在低模糊度的旅行規劃中則相反。我們還識別出標準LLM評估中的測量不對稱性，其中不受限制的提示可能會膨脹約束遵循分數，並掩蓋結構化提示的實際價值。一項初步的回顧性調查（N = 20）進一步表明所需的後續提示減少了66.1%，從3.33輪減少到1.13輪。這些發現表明，結構化意圖表示可以改善人體-AI互動中的對齊和可用性，特別是在用戶意圖本質上模糊的任務中。
2603.18976.author: Peng Gang et.al.
